title: viola odorata var. subcarnea
intro: Viola odorata var. subcarnea, also known as the sweet-scented violet, is a variant of the sweet violet plant that belongs to the viola genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and calm the skin, as well as its ability to act as a natural antihistamine. The health benefits of Viola odorata var. subcarnea include its use in treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Viola odorata var. subcarnea is often used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
